title: Effusiella jalapensis
taxonomy: Effusiella jalapensis is a genus of fungi, specifically a type of lichen. It belongs to the family Gyalectaceae. This genus is further classified within the order Peltigerales and the class Lecanoromycetes. Effusiella jalapensis is known to be a small to medium-sized lichen, often found in tropical regions. The classification of Effusiella jalapensis is still being researched, but it is generally accepted as a member of the lichen family.
